message:
feat(Python): Implement 4 Emscripten CPython modules in Zig

WebAssembly/Emscripten support modules:
- emscripten_signal.zig: Signal handling with blocked/pending masks
- emscripten_syscalls.zig: Virtual file system and syscall emulation
- emscripten_trampoline.zig: Function call trampolines for WASM
- emscripten_trampoline_inner.zig: Low-level stack manipulation and async
